data_description.uri: WebSocket URI of your SolMate, e.g. ws://solmate:9124/
data_description.serial_num: Serial number printed on your SolMate device

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to SolMate. Check the URI, serial number, and password.

set_minimum_injection.name: Set Minimum Injection
set_minimum_injection.description: Set the minimum injection power in Watts (0–200 W).

set_maximum_injection.name: Set Maximum Injection
set_maximum_injection.description: Set the maximum injection power in Watts (0–800 W).

set_minimum_battery_percentage.name: Set Minimum Battery Percentage
set_minimum_battery_percentage.description: Set the minimum battery percentage before injection starts.

set_boost_injection.name: Set Boost Injection
set_boost_injection.description: Temporarily boost injection to a given wattage for a set duration. Set time to 0 to deactivate boost.

set_wattage.name: Wattage
set_wattage.description: Boost injection power in Watts (0–800 W).

set_time.name: Duration
set_time.description: Boost duration in seconds. Set to 0 to deactivate.
